title: Format currencies correctly

posts.author: Zalayeta (Mathieu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a number field on my boards which shows the price of the item. I added the snippet € on it because I work with €.
It would be nice if it keeps the 2 digits after the ,. For exemple when the number is 111,10 it show 111,1 instead of 111,10.

posts.author: jthorn (Josiah Thorngate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not sure if replying here is better than starting a new thread, but I’m giving it a shot.

I have the same problem, but in USD. If my second decimal place is a 0, eg “$1.50”, the number column discards it—“$1.5”—even though I’ve selected a currency format. Seems obvious that it should retain that zero.
